SavedQueries.Name: Order summary
SavedQueries.Sql: SELECT * FROM vw_OrderSummary ORDER BY OrderedAtUtc DESC LIMIT 100;

PublishedEndpoints.Name: Customers by country
PublishedEndpoints.Sql: SELECT * FROM Customers WHERE Country = @country ORDER BY LastName, FirstName;

PublishedEndpoints.Name: Odd-second policy demo
PublishedEndpoints.Sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') AS ExecutedAtUtc, 'OddSecond policy passed' AS Message;
